retry_reason: kref_put is a release operation; retrying would cause a double-put which leads to use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a release (put) wrapper that decrements the kref reference count on the acpi_ipmi_msg object. When the refcount reaches zero, the provided release callback (ipmi_msg_release_kref) will free the object. The caller must have previously acquired a valid reference on tx_msg. After calling this function, the caller must not access tx_msg again, as the object may have been freed.
